title: Energizer CR2025 Batteries (4 Pack) - Lithium 3V Coin Battery - Car Key Fobs, Watches, Home/Medical/Fitness Devices - 10 Year Shelf Life - Child Resistant Packaging
features: What You'll Get - 4 Energizer 2025 Lithium Coin batteries
Long Lasting Power for Specialty Devices - Ideal for heart rate monitors, remotes, keyless entry systems, glucose monitors, toys, and gamesclocks and more
Leak Protection - Holds power for up to 10 years in storage, ensuring you have Lithium Coin Batteries ready when you need them
Durability - These lithium batteries can withstand a wide temperature range, from -30º to 60º C
Replacement for: L14, DL2032, SB-T15, and 5004LC
description: Product Description Energizer lithium 3 V CR2025 battery gives reliable power for heart-rate monitors, keyless entry, glucose monitors, toys and games. It holds power for 8 years in storage. Box Contains 4 x CR2025 Batteries
